name: 01-open-a4-booklet
description: Opening a uniform-A4 multi-page PDF must (a) open in the current default viewMode ('single' — sinds de continuous-disable-fase is de default niet teruggezet bij de heractivering van doorlopende weergave; zie testprotocol-eindrapport), (b) settle on a sane scale (not the 0.0012 race), (c) pick the Raster (PDFium) render engine. Page number + annotation count are NOT asserted here because they reflect user-session state from prior scenarios, not load behaviour.

assertions.label: A4 booklet opens in default (single) mode — continuous-default niet hersteld bij heractivering, zie rapport
scale settled in sane range (no 0.0012 race)
